results.rendered_html:
pratividhā 3 U.
1 To counteract, correct, repair, retaliate, remedy, take steps against; arthavāda eṣaḥ . doṣaṃ tu me kaṃcitkathaya yena sa pratividhīyeta  U. 1 ; kṣiprapeva kasmānna prativihitamāryeṇa Mu
3
2 To dispose, arrange, prepare.
3 To despatch, send.
4 To doom, condemn;  U. 4.
